title: hydrangea macrophylla var. hortensis
intro: Hydrangea macrophylla var. hortensis, also known as the Bigleaf Hydrangea or Hortensia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain glycosides and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea macrophylla var. hortensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and alleviate joint pain, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Hydrangea macrophylla var. hortensis typically involve drying the roots, leaves, or flowers, and using them to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
